TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == Pazik u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :巴吉克部落 u canan ku Pazik(Pazik是什麼?)ː u buyu' i tiza i Kalinku, caay ka talakaw, caay ka tabakiay a buyu'. uniyan a buyu' mahiza ku buting u pazik sananayay a buting, kyu u pangangangan ku "Pazik". izaw ku niyazu' itiza, izaw ku Pazik,Cikep,Ciku,Tuapun a niyazu' i tiza. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == pazik u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :***** u ʦanan ku pazik(pazik***?)* u bujuʔ~ʡ i tiza i kar~ɾinku, ʦaaj ka tar~ɾakaw, ʦaaj ka tabakiaj a bujuʔ~ʡ. unijan a bujuʔ~ʡ maħiza ku butiŋ u pazik sananajaj a butiŋ, kju u paŋaŋaŋan ku "pazik". izaw ku nijazuʔ~ʡ itiza, izaw ku pazik,ʦikəp,ʦiku,tuapun a nijazuʔ~ʡ i tiza. namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == Pazik u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :巴吉克部落 u canan ku Pazik(Pazik是什麼?)ː u buyu' i tiza i Kalinku, caay ka talakaw, caay ka tabakiay a buyu'. uniyan a buyu' mahiza ku buting u pazik sananayay a buting, kyu u pangangangan ku "Pazik". izaw ku niyazu' itiza, izaw ku Pazik,Cikep,Ciku,Tuapun a niyazu' i tiza. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == pazik u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :***** u ʦanan ku pazik(pazik***?)* u bujuʔ~ʡ i tiza i kar~ɾinku, ʦaaj ka tar~ɾakaw, ʦaaj ka tabakiaj a bujuʔ~ʡ. unijan a bujuʔ~ʡ maħiza ku butiŋ u pazik sananajaj a butiŋ, kju u paŋaŋaŋan ku "pazik". izaw ku nijazuʔ~ʡ itiza, izaw ku pazik,ʦikəp,ʦiku,tuapun a nijazuʔ~ʡ i tiza. namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
